staff.name: Phoina Achieng
staff.bio: With over 7 years of experience, Phoina founded the studio to bring world-class beauty services to Nairobi. Specialising in bridal and editorial makeup.

staff.name: Zara Kamau
staff.bio: Zara is our master of natural hair and protective styles. She brings creativity and technical excellence to every client.

staff.name: Amina Oduya
staff.bio: Amina's intricate nail art designs have won her a loyal following. From gel to acrylics, she turns nails into canvases.

staff.name: Fatuma Wangari
staff.bio: Fatuma is certified in advanced skincare and facials with a focus on melanin-rich skin.

staff.name: Grace Njeri
staff.bio: Grace specialises in everyday glam and event makeup. Her clients love her for clean, flawless finishes.

staff.name: Kezia Otieno
staff.bio: Kezia leads the professional makeup certification program at Phoina Academy. She has trained over 200 students.

staff.name: Blessing Adeyemi
staff.bio: Blessing is our lash and brow specialist. She transforms looks with precision lash extensions and brow artistry.

staff.name: Imani Mwangi
staff.bio: Imani keeps the studio running smoothly — from bookings to client experience, she ensures every visit is perfect.
